nodes.name: AML-Large-LI-Multi-GINE.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures an AML Large-LI hetero-edge classification training run for the GINE model with multi-run variants. It sets dataset encoders, link-neighbor sampling, weighted cross-entropy, validation cadence, and optimizer scheduling for FraudGT experiments.
nodes.languageNotes: YAML experiment configuration organized around dataset, train, validation, model, gnn/gt, and optimizer sections.
